_meta.description: Daily code-health telemetry. One row appended per run. Measured via npm run check / npm run build.
_meta.fields: date, branch_base_sha, main_sha, typecheck_clean, typecheck_errors_branch, typecheck_errors_main, lint_clean, test_pass_count, test_fail_count, build_clean, bundle_largest_chunk_kb, dependency_count, dev_dependency_count, security_advisory_count, notes

history.notes: No lint or test scripts defined in package.json (only check, build, dev, start, db:push). Build is green because esbuild/vite do not typecheck. CI gate (npm run check) is red on main — see incidents INC-2026-05-20-001 and issues #191/#232. Branch base f824ce0 shares NO git ancestor with origin/main c356664 (unrelated histories). security_advisory_count not measured (npm audit not run in this env).
